body.input:
User: [T7a approve-phase1] In a single response, call BOTH at the same time: (1) execute-tool with toolName='tool-help' and instanceId='hermes' to list available tools, and (2) execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'approve-test'}. The generate_image tool requires user confirmation - it should NOT execute yet. End your reply with STEP_OK after the tool calls.

Assistant: The async remote task has completed. All tool results from the previous step are now available in the context above.

User: [T8 parallel-tools] In a single response, call BOTH at the same time: (1) execute-tool with toolName='tool-help', instanceId='hermes', callbackMode='wait' to list available tools, and (2) execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'green square'}, callbackMode='wait'. IMPORTANT: You MUST use callbackMode='wait' for both tools - do NOT use wakeUp or detach. Check that tool-help returned a non-empty tools array and generate_image returned an imageUrl (not a taskId). End your reply with STEP_OK if both tools returned correct results, or FAILED: <reason> if either tool failed or only one ran.
